perturbation.original_text: Dolphin agrees to complete its photo-editing services within 14 days of receiving the original digital photo files. The completed files must meet DGT pre-defined standards for finished products;
perturbation.changed_text: Dolphin will endeavor to complete its photo-editing services within 21 days of receiving the original digital photo files. The completed files must meet DGT pre-defined standards for finished products;
perturbation.explanation: The original agreement specifies that Dolphin must complete photo-editing services within 14 days. This change replaces 'agrees to complete' with 'will endeavor to complete' and extends the deadline to 21 days, introducing ambiguity about whether Dolphin is obligated to meet the original 14-day deadline. This creates an in-text contradiction because the original 14-day requirement is now weakened and uncertain.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Dolphin will endeavor to complete its photo-editing services within 21 days of receiving the original digital photo files. The completed files must meet DGT pre-defined standards for finished products;
perturbation.justification: The original text specified a completion timeframe of 14 days, creating a clear obligation. The changed text introduces ambiguity by using 'will endeavor to complete' and extending the deadline to 21 days. The 'endeavor' language weakens the obligation, creating an in-text contradiction because it is now uncertain if Dolphin is obligated to meet the original 14-day deadline.

perturbation.original_text: DGT shall be entitled to terminate this Agreement if Dolphin fails to meet its requirements and material obligation hereunder and only after DGT have given Dolphin written notice of such failure and only after Dolphin has not rectified such failure within 10 days of the notice. Dolphin shall be entitled to terminate this Agreement only after DGT fails to meet a material obligation hereunder and only after Dolphin has given DGT written notice of such failure and only after the DGT has not rectified such failure within 30 days of the notice.
perturbation.changed_text: DGT shall be entitled to terminate this Agreement if Dolphin fails to meet its requirements and material obligation hereunder. Dolphin shall be entitled to terminate this Agreement only after DGT fails to meet a material obligation hereunder and only after Dolphin has given DGT written notice of such failure and only after the DGT has not rectified such failure within 30 days of the notice.
perturbation.explanation: The original agreement specifies that DGT needs to give a written notice and allows Dolphin 10 days to rectify before termination. This change removes the notice period from DGT, introducing ambiguity and in-text contradiction, by making it uncertain if a notice is required or if DGT can terminate with no prior notice.
perturbation.contradicted_text: DGT shall be entitled to terminate this Agreement if Dolphin fails to meet its requirements and material obligation hereunder. Dolphin shall be entitled to terminate this Agreement only after DGT fails to meet a material obligation hereunder and only after Dolphin has given DGT written notice of such failure and only after the DGT has not rectified such failure within 30 days of the notice.
perturbation.justification: The changed text removes the requirement for DGT to provide written notice and a 10-day rectification period to Dolphin before termination. The contradicted text specifies that DGT must provide this notice and period. Removing this requirement introduces a direct contradiction, as the contradicted text implies Dolphin is entitled to notice before termination by DGT, while the changed text does not require it, leading to an in-text contradiction as defined in Ambiguities – In Text Contradiction, rendering the agreement unclear and potentially unenforceable in that specific area.

perturbation.original_text: Dolphin shall charge DGT USD1.50 per delivered, completed photo. The price per unit shall be open to renegotiation - in response to competitive pricing pressures - upon receipt of written notice at any time by either party;
perturbation.changed_text: Dolphin shall charge DGT USD2.00 per delivered, completed photo. The price per unit shall be open to renegotiation - in response to competitive pricing pressures - upon receipt of written notice at any time by either party;
perturbation.explanation: The original agreement specifies that Dolphin shall charge DGT USD1.50. This change increases the price to USD2.00. This introduces an in-text contradiction as it is unclear if the price is USD1.50 or USD2.00
perturbation.contradicted_text: Dolphin shall charge DGT USD2.00 per delivered, completed photo. The price per unit shall be open to renegotiation - in response to competitive pricing pressures - upon receipt of written notice at any time by either party;
perturbation.justification: The changed text alters the price Dolphin charges DGT from USD1.50 to USD2.00. The contradicted text states that Dolphin shall charge DGT USD2.00. While at first glance it may not seem like a contradiction, the explanation states 'This introduces an in-text contradiction as it is unclear if the price is USD1.50 or USD2.00' since the original agreement specified USD1.50, and the changed text introduces USD2.00. Because the changed text creates ambiguity about the price, it introduces an in-text contradiction, fitting the definition of Ambiguities - In Text Contradiction, as it makes the interpretation unclear. Therefore, a strong in-text contradiction exists.
